<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Pipeline; use Predis\Connection\ConnectionInterface; use SplQueue; /** * Command pipeline that writes commands to the servers but discards responses. */ class FireAndForget extends Pipeline { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ protected function executePipeline(ConnectionInterface $connection, SplQueue $commands) { while (!$commands->isEmpty()) { $connection->writeRequest($commands->dequeue()); } $connection->disconnect(); return []; } }
